name: Theory-Level Autoformalization: From Isolated Statements to Unified Formal Knowledge Bases
summary: arXiv:2607.13292v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Autoformalization translates informal natural language into formal, machine-verifiable languages. While most work focuses on individual statements, r...
description: arXiv:2607.13292v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Autoformalization translates informal natural language into formal, machine-verifiable languages. While most work focuses on individual statements, real formalization efforts are inherently theory-level: they require an entire web of axioms, definitions, and lemmas before target theorems can even be stated. In this position paper, we argue for the...
author: Marcus J. Min, Mike He, Zhaoyu Li, Zixuan Yi, Sharad Malik, Aarti Gupta, Xujie Si, Osbert Bastani
